<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Ionos](https://ionos.com) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/ionos/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "ionos"
  dnsCredentials:
    # IONOS_API_KEY: API key `<prefix>.<secret>` https://developer.hosting.ionos.com/docs/getstarted
    apiKey: ""
    # IONOS_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # IONOS_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 900)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # IONOS_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 300)
    ttl: ""
```

Credentials are passed directly to lego using strong types and are never written to the process environment.
You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
